title: SmartPlaylist Pattern Meta
description: Per-config metadata file at {patternId}/meta.json. Contains feed matching rules to identify the podcast, and an ordered list of playlist definitions. The app uses podcastGuid and feedUrls for matching.

dataVersion.description: Monotonically increasing version for this pattern's data. Bumped by CI whenever any file in this pattern directory changes (meta.json or any playlist definition). The mobile app compares this against its cached version; a mismatch triggers re-fetching all files for this pattern.

id.description: A unique identifier for this config, derived at creation time. Must match the parent directory name. Used for constructing file paths (e.g., {id}/playlists/{playlistId}.json).

podcastGuid.description: The podcast's unique ID from its RSS feed. When set, this takes priority over feed URL matching for more reliable identification. Omit when a reliable GUID is not available.

feedUrls.description: One or more RSS feed URLs that identify this podcast. The app matches incoming feeds against these URLs to find the right config. Multiple URLs support podcasts that have migrated hosts or have alternate feeds.

yearGroupedEpisodes.description: When enabled, the main episode list in the app groups episodes by their publication year with year headers. This is independent of playlist grouping and affects the default browsing experience. Useful for long-running podcasts.

playlists.description: Ordered list of playlist definition IDs. Each maps to a file at playlists/{id}.json. The order here determines the display order in the app. Must contain at least one entry.
